info.title: azp
info.description: CLI for interacting with Azure Pipelines

commands.name: check
commands.description: Render a pipeline's YAML by expanding template parameters.

options.name: --parameters
options.description: Template parameters as comma-separated key=value pairs (e.g. env=staging,imageTag=latest). [Default: null]

commands.name: info
commands.description: Show detailed information about a pipeline, including variables and parameters.

commands.name: install-skill
commands.description: Install the agent skill file to a local or user directory.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all pipelines associated with the current repository.

commands.name: llmstxt
commands.description: Print comprehensive tool documentation (run this first).

commands.name: logs
commands.description: Download logs for a specific task from a pipeline run.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Queue a pipeline run on Azure DevOps.

options.name: --parameters
options.description: Template parameters as comma-separated key=value pairs (e.g. env=staging,imageTag=latest). [Default: null]

options.name: --variables
options.description: Pipeline variable overrides as comma-separated key=value pairs (e.g. tag=v1,debug=true). [Default: null]

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show the status of a pipeline run.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Wait for a pipeline run to complete.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Use interactive progress bars to display pipeline status.

options.name: --fail-on-error
options.description: Exit with non-zero code if the pipeline fails or is canceled.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress the terminal bell when the wait completes.
